9:41

Date night, made restaurant-easy

Date night, made restaurant-easy

Romantic recipes designed for two — premium ingredients, simple steps, restaurant-worthy results.

Customer reviews

What people are saying

4.9 from 2,847 reviews
Designed by Chef Marco Rossi
Our date night curator

Restaurant magic, on your kitchen table

Every recipe in this collection was shaped by Chef Marco Rossi, head chef at a Michelin-recognised trattoria in Florence and a long-time HelloFresh culinary partner. His brief: a menu you'd happily order on an anniversary, but easy enough to cook between glasses of wine.

No fussy techniques, no obscure ingredients. Just considered pairings, restaurant-grade proteins, and pre-portioned for two — so you can spend less time prepping and more time across the table from someone who matters.

Portioned for two
Every recipe arrives perfectly measured for a couple — no halving, no leftovers, no guesswork.
Ready in 35 minutes or less
Built for an evening, not a project. Pour the wine, light a candle, dinner is ready before the playlist ends.
Restaurant-grade ingredients
Hand-cut steaks, fresh pasta, scallops, truffle butter — premium produce you'd find on a fine-dining menu.
Wine pairings included
Each recipe comes with Marco's pick — a varietal that brings out the best in the dish, with notes on why it works.

"A great date night isn't about complication — it's about cooking something you're proud of, then actually being present at the table. That's what I built this menu for."

- Chef Marco Rossi, culinary partner
